name: Fat Free Lemon Poppy Seed Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease and flour (or use parchment paper) a large cookie sheet.
3. Mix dry ingredients in a bowl.
4. In another bowl, combine wet ingredients and mix with the dry ingredients until forming 2-15 inch logs.
5. Bake for 30 minutes.
6. Cool slightly and cut diagonally into 1/2 inch slices.
7. Return the sliced logs to the oven and bake for an additional 8-10 minutes until crisp.
8. Allow to cool completely before storing in an airtight container.
